mapper.sql:
SELECT SST.RECORD_NO, SST.CARD_NO, SST.PERSON_ID, SST.DOOR_TYPE, SST.INSERT_BY, CASE SST.INSERT_BY WHEN 'M' THEN 'Tự động' WHEN 'A' THEN 'Xin phép' ELSE 'Thủ công' END AS DATA_SOURCE_NAME, SST.REMARK, SST.AR_DATE_STR, TO_CHAR(SST.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS SWIPE_DATE, TO_CHAR(SST.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS SWIPE_TIME, SST.EMPLOYEE_NAME, SST.DEVICENAME, CASE WHEN HE.EMPID IS NOT NULL THEN HE.EMPID ELSE SST.CARD_NO END AS EMPID, CASE WHEN HE.LOCAL_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN HE.LOCAL_NAME ELSE SST.CARD_NO END AS LOCAL_NAME, HE.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_SST SST LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON SST.CARD_NO = HE.EMPID WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( UPPER(CASE WHEN HE.EMPID IS NOT NULL THEN HE.EMPID ELSE SST.CARD_NO END) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER( CASE WHEN HE.LOCAL_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN HE.LOCAL_NAME ELSE SST.CARD_NO END )) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND HE.DEPTNO IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HE.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND SST.R_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SST.R_TIME < TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(RECORD_NO), 0) + 1 FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_SST
INSERT INTO AR_MAC_RECORDS_SST ( RECORD_NO, CARD_NO, PERSON_ID, DOOR_TYPE, INSERT_BY, AR_DATE_STR, R_TIME, ACTIVITY, EMPLOYEE_NAME, DEVICENAME ) VALUES ( #{recordNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doorType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'M', #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{swipeDatetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 1, #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT PERSON_ID FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1
